rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relation to Educ. Code §10.005, which governs reporting requirements for an interagency data system. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 10.005. REPORTING REQUIREMENTS. (a) Not later than September 1 of each year, the lead agency shall submit to the governor and the legislature a report on the progress in developing, establishing, and operating the system.
_note: No conflict; the rule text concerns education data system reporting, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
